request: Show customer names next to their total spending.
search_document:
User Request: Show customer names next to their total spending.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Monthly revenue trend
Title: Top Customers by Spending
Type: table
Description: Highest spending customers aggregated by total spending
Title: Total Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Customers by Spending
sql_queries.description: Highest spending customers aggregated by total spending
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CustomerID, c.CompanyName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSpending FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.CompanyName ORDER BY TotalSpending DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM "Order Details" od
